subject: Meet Rachel Ward and the farm behind our beef
preheader: Kempsey, NSW. Regenerative pasture. 100% grass-fed cattle. This is where it starts.
body:
One of the things that makes FarmThru different is that every product traces to a real farm, run by a real person.

Today we want to introduce you to one of our most important partners.

Rachel's Farm sits on the northern NSW coast near Kempsey. Rachel Ward, actor and regenerative farming advocate, founded it. Her cattle are 100% grass-fed, raised on pasture without hormones or feedlots. After the 2020 bushfires nearly destroyed her property, she rebuilt using regenerative practices.

Her beef is some of the best in the state. Deep red, beautifully marbled, with a flavour that comes from animals eating what they are supposed to eat: grass, on open land, in clean air.

Rachel is not just a supplier. She is a key partner who helped shape how FarmThru works. She understood from the start that farmers needed a shorter path to families. No wholesalers taking a cut. No cold-storage facilities holding meat for weeks.

That is what the hub-and-collect model does. Rachel's beef goes from her farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it days later. The difference is in every bite.

We work with named farms like hers across NSW. Each one is regenerative. Each one earns a fairer price.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Farm spotlight email. Hero image: Rachel's Farm landscape with cattle grazing, golden hour light. Below: portrait of Rachel with her property. Product shots of grass-fed beef cuts. Single CTA. Educational but appetising. Make the reader hungry and curious.
